# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-elasticsearch-snapshots
        region: us-east-1
        endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
        access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
        secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
        chunk_size: 100mb
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
    fs:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /backups/elasticsearch
        compress: true
        chunk_size: 100mb
        concurrent_streams: 5
  schedule:
    - name: daily_snapshot
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      repository: s3
      indices: "*"
      settings:
        wait_for_completion: true
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: true
        partial: false
    - name: weekly_snapshot
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      repository: fs
      indices: "log-*"
      settings:
        wait_for_completion: true
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        partial: true
  restore:
    - name: restore_from_s3
      repository: s3
      snapshot: "daily_snapshot_20231201"
      indices: "index-*"
      settings:
        index_settings:
          index.number_of_replicas: 1
        rename_pattern: "(.+)"
        rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
        wait_for_completion: true
    - name: restore_from_fs
      repository: fs
      snapshot: "weekly_snapshot_20231201"
      indices: "log-*"
      settings:
        index_settings:
          index.number_of_replicas: 0
        wait_for_completion: true
